title: DHCP, DNS, IPv6 Services, and Time
description: Implement redundant address, name, and time services for clients, infrastructure, and secure operations. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a validated core network-services design while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Configure dynamic addressing and relays with exclusions and reservations.
Build and troubleshoot forward, reverse, authoritative, recursive, and secure DNS behavior.
Select and verify time services required for logs, certificates, and authentication.
